items.title: MSc Electrical Engineering – Computational Intelligence
items.summary: Master's degree from TU Berlin with specialisation in Computational Intelligence. Thesis on adaptive neural network architectures for cognitive load estimation.

items.title: Research Associate – Intelligent Tutoring System (ITS)
items.summary: Designed and implemented an ITS integrating affective sensing and pedagogical decision logic. Led end-to-end ML pipeline from sensor data to adaptive content delivery.

items.title: Research Associate – EEG Stress Detection (LAETEC)
items.summary: Ongoing research at LAETEC Lab applying PyTorch-based deep learning to EEG signals for real-time stress classification. Includes data collection and preprocessing pipelines.

items.title: Data Engineer – FAIR Reproducible Workflows
items.summary: Designed reproducible evaluation workflows and experiment metadata structures following FAIR data principles for a multi-institution research platform.

items.title: Affective State Classification from EEG Signals
items.summary: Workshop paper at NeurIPS presenting a transformer-based architecture for EEG affective state classification. Achieved state-of-the-art on DEAP benchmark.

items.title: FAIR Pipelines for Neuroscience Data
items.summary: Peer-reviewed article describing a framework for FAIR-compliant neuroscience data pipelines. Published in Journal of Open Research Software.

items.title: English – CEFR C1
items.summary: Certified English proficiency at CEFR C1 level (Cambridge Advanced Certificate, 2021).

items.title: Analytics Collaboration / Cross-team Projects
items.summary: Collaborated with analytics and product teams across multiple organisations on model evaluation, feedback loops, and data product delivery.
